prerequisites: A Salesflare account with access to Settings > API keys.
An API key generated in Salesflare (the connector's required api_key config field).

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Salesflare authenticates each request with an API key sent as a bearer token in the Authorization header (Authorization: Bearer <APIKEY>). Provide this key in the connector's api_key field. This is the only credential the connector requires.

setupSteps.title: Create a Salesflare API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Salesflare and open Settings > API keys. Click the large blue + button at the bottom right of the screen to generate a new API key, then copy the generated key value.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the copied key into the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it as a bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <APIKEY>) on every request to the Salesflare API, so no other credentials are needed.

sources.title: Do you have an API? - Salesflare Help Center
Where can I find API documentation for Salesflare? - Salesflare Help Center
